description: A warehouse stores three chemicals: Anhydrous Ammonia (UN 1005), Nitric Acid >70% (UN 2031), and Acetone (UN 1090), as detailed in ~/Desktop/facility_chemical_inventory.csv. Perform a reactivity hazard assessment for all pairwise combinations of these chemicals using the CAMEO Chemicals tool (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). For each combination, identify hazardous reactions, predicted products, and specific dangers. Save a comprehensive hazard assessment report to ~/Documents/warehouse_hazard_assessment.txt that includes the pairwise analysis, an overall risk summary, and storage separation recommendations.
